mapper.select: SELECT d.*, e.name AS exercise_name, e.category AS exercise_category FROM training_record_detail d LEFT JOIN exercise e ON d.exercise_id = e.id WHERE d.record_id = #{recordId} AND d.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY d.sort_order ASC, d.id ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO training_record_detail (record_id, exercise_id, set_number, reps, weight, is_completed, notes, sort_order) VALUES
(#{item.recordId}, #{item.exerciseId}, #{item.setNumber}, #{item.reps}, #{item.weight}, #{item.isCompleted}, #{item.notes}, #{item.sortOrder})
mapper.update: UPDATE training_record_detail SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE record_id = #{recordId}
UPDATE training_record_detail SET is_completed = #{isCompleted} WHERE id = #{id}
